meta.axes_note: FABRICATED sample for format + tests only. money_at_risk x time_to_trigger, ordinal 1-5. Do not cite these numbers.

types.rationale: example: a missed cap means you misprice exposure and may fail to invoke it when sued
example: fixed cash on breach; miss it and you misjudge downside
example: tight window; miss it and you are locked into another paid term
example: continuing duties and cost after the contract ends
example: sets the clock the notice period runs against
example: rarely direct money-at-risk; interpretation law, not forum

entries.quote: either party may elect not to renew by giving written notice at least ninety (90) days
entries.rationale: example: 90-day non-renewal window; missing it renews a six-figure subscription

entries.quote: total aggregate liability shall not exceed the fees paid in the preceding twelve months
entries.rationale: example: 12-month fees cap; carve-outs sit outside it, so read alongside indemnity

entries.quote: a service credit equal to ten percent (10%) of monthly fees for each failure
entries.rationale: example: SLA credit; whether it is an exclusive remedy is a legal question - abstain

entries.quote: provider shall make customer data available for export for thirty (30) days after termination
entries.rationale: example: 30-day export window; miss it and you lose your data or pay to recover it

entries.quote: this agreement shall be governed by the laws of the State of Delaware
entries.rationale: example: interpretation law; low direct money-at-risk on a miss

entries.quote: this agreement automatically renews for successive one (1) year terms
entries.rationale: example: 1-year auto-renew; sets the clock the notice window runs against
